settings.modelRecordNotice: This platform's AI model has completed algorithm record filing in accordance with the Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services.
settings.usageRulesDesc: View platform usage rules and terms
settings.usageRulesSection1Content: Users should register with real information and keep credentials secure; accounts are for personal use only and may not be lent, transferred, or sold; users bear responsibility for losses from improper account management.
settings.usageRulesSection2Content: Content must comply with laws and may not contain illegal, infringing, pornographic, violent, or discriminatory content; the platform may delete or block violating content.
settings.usageRulesSection3Content: Prohibited: compromising system security, bulk data scraping, spam, malicious API attacks, abusing AI for illegal content; violators face service restrictions or termination.
settings.usageRulesSection4Content: Content copyright belongs to original rights holders; unauthorized copying or distribution is prohibited; AI-generated content must comply with applicable laws and platform policies.
settings.usageRulesSection5Content: AI-generated content is for reference only and does not constitute professional advice; the platform does not guarantee accuracy or completeness; users bear usage risks.
settings.appPermissionDesc: View app permissions and their purposes
settings.appPermissionCameraPurpose: For photo upload, avatar settings, and image generation
settings.appPermissionAlbumPurpose: For selecting images from album for upload and image generation
settings.appPermissionMicPurpose: For voice input and voice dialogue
settings.appPermissionNotificationPurpose: For receiving order, message, and activity notifications
settings.appPermissionStoragePurpose: For caching data, saving generated files, and offline content
settings.appPermissionNetworkPurpose: For accessing network services, loading content, and syncing data
settings.appPermissionDeviceIdPurpose: For device identification, security, and account protection

settings.changePhoneIntroDesc: For account security, verify your current phone first, then bind the new number; the process is simple and takes just a few steps.

settings.changePhoneNewCodePlaceholder: Enter verification code sent to new phone
settings.changePhoneNoticeDesc: After change, login, password recovery, and notifications will use the new phone; the old number can no longer be used. Please confirm before proceeding.

account.a: Click “Forgot password” on the login page to reset via phone verification.
Go to Settings to update your nickname, avatar and other info.
Contact support to submit a deletion request, processed within 3 business days.

payment.a: WeChat Pay, Alipay, Stripe credit card and USDC.
Contact support within 7 days of subscription for a full refund.
Click “Cancel subscription” on the pricing page. Billing stops next cycle.

project.a: Click “New Project” in the workspace and enter a name.
Free plan: 1 project. Pro and above: unlimited.
Open project details and click “Share” to generate a link.

ai.a: GPT-4, Claude 3.5, Gemini and more. Pro unlocks all models.
Use the model selector at the top of the chat page.

tech.q: How to get an API Key?
tech.a: Create an app on the Developer platform to get an API Key.
Default 60 requests/min. Enterprise can request higher limits.
Official SDKs for Python, Node.js and Go.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn about our platform and team
about.introDesc1: IHUI is a comprehensive platform focused on AI education and knowledge sharing, dedicated to providing users with high-quality learning resources and intelligent learning experiences.
about.introDesc2: We bring together rich course content, hands-on projects, and community resources to help every learner grow efficiently.
about.introDesc3: Through AI-empowered education, we make learning smarter, more efficient, and more fun.
about.addressValue: Zhongguancun Software Park, Haidian District, Beijing
about.missionDesc1: Making AI technology accessible to every learner, breaking down barriers to knowledge.
about.missionDesc2: Building an open, shared, and intelligent educational ecosystem to promote lifelong learning.
